# LABEL_STATUS

**Database:** Operational

**Description:** Stores the various LABEL_STATUSs generated by LABEL_STATUS components.

## Columns

| Name | Data Type | Nullable | Default | Primary | FK To | Description |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| LabelStatus | INT(10,0) | False |  | True |  | Unique identifier of a record (key) in a table. |
| Name | NVARCHAR(50) | False |  | False |  | Label Status Name or description. |
| TextID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Unique identifier of the Text. Can be used for translation purposes. |
